zh.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England,: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Browne於1547年出生在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，他的父親William Browne42歲，母親Joan CECIL37歲。他於1584年7月23日與Mary Cramphorne在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1638年1月21日在他的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Browne于1547年出生在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯时，他的父亲William Browne42岁，母亲Joan CECIL37岁。他于1584年7月23日与Mary Cramphorne在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1638年1月21日在他的家乡享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Browne was born in 1547, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, his father, William Browne, was 42 and his mother, Joan CECIL, was 37. He married Mary Cramphorne on 23 July 1584, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 January 1638, in his hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Browne est né en 1547, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Browne, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan CECIL, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Mary Cramphorne le 23 juillet 1584, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1638, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Browne 1547 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Browne 42 und seine Mutter Joan CECIL 37. Er hat am 23. Juli 1584 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England Mary Cramphorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1638 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Browne è nato il nel 1547 nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Browne, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Joan CECIL, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Mary Cramphorne il 23 luglio 1584, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1638, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Browneが1547年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父William Browneは42歳，母Joan CECILは37歳であった。1584年7月23日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスでMary Cramphorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年1月21日に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne(이)가 1547년 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Browne(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan CECIL(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1584년 7월 23일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 Mary Cramphorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년 1월 21일 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Browne родился в 1547 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Browne было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan CECIL, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Cramphorne 23 июля 1584 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 января 1638 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год.
